meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to implement professional version control in your student projects.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template automates boilerplate setup and integrates Git version control from the first commit. By pairing this with Claude Code, you enforce structural integrity and history tracking, ensuring your student projects are production-ready, easily reversible, and immune to the chaos of manual file management.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: it’s 3:00 AM, you’ve refactored your entire codebase, and now the application won't boot. You search for the previous version, but all you find is a folder named 'project_final_v2_real'. The lack of version control isn't just a nuisance; it’s the primary barrier between a hobbyist and a professional engineer.

True mastery begins when you stop treating your code like a disposable script and start treating it like a system. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a professional scaffolding that forces best practices into your workflow. This guide bridges the gap between chaotic coding and a robust, version-controlled architecture.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Start by cloning the baseline repository. This ensures you have the necessary .gitignore and directory structure pre-configured for modern development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the base Antigravity template, ensuring strict Git integration and a clean module structure.

steps.title: Configure Automated Versioning
steps.description: Establish a commit hook strategy to ensure every significant change is tracked before the code is even run.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add pre-commit hooks to this project to enforce linting and staging before any code execution.

steps.title: Structure the Data Logic
steps.description: Decouple your business logic from the UI to ensure that version control snapshots remain clean and meaningful.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current directory into a domain-driven design structure suitable for the Antigravity template.

steps.title: Implement Claude Code History Tracking
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate atomic commit messages that document the 'why' behind every code change.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file changes and generate a descriptive, conventional commit message for these modifications.

steps.title: Verification and Deployment
steps.description: Finalize your build pipeline by testing the integration between your local repo and remote version control.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the project integrity and simulate a CI/CD build pipeline test run.

pro_tips: Always use conventional commits (e.g., 'feat:', 'fix:') to make your project history readable for future employers.
Ignore node_modules and build artifacts immediately; keep your repository footprint small to ensure faster cloning.
Use branching strategies (git flow) even for solo projects to keep your 'main' branch stable at all times.
Leverage Claude Code's ability to 'explain' diffs to generate your project documentation automatically as you work.
Create a 'sandbox' branch for experimental features so you never pollute your stable production-ready code.
resources: Git Best Practices for Students: https://git-scm.com/doc
content.next_steps: After mastering version control, begin integrating automated unit tests into your Antigravity template to ensure your code remains bug-free during future iterations.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start engineering with professional-grade tools. Your portfolio will thank you, and your future team will be impressed by your workflow discipline. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
